title: SQL: variable arguments in CAST function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, name String);
SELECT CAST(value AS Int32) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value / id AS value_per_id FROM test_table;
SELECT CAST((SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table) AS Int32);
key_bug_features: CAST function with variable arguments in SQL
